changeSet.author: odysejapka
changeSet.comment: Create spontan_group_assignment table for assigning spontan definitions to performance groups
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS spontan_group_assignment ( id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY, city_id INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES city(id), problem INTEGER NOT NULL, age INTEGER NOT NULL, league VARCHAR(255), spontan_definition_id BIGINT REFERENCES spontan_definition(id), judge_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 3, UNIQUE(city_id, problem, age, league) );
